rationale: SEAM/TYPE lens confirmed clean at e71a7991. All four exported signatures are byte-identical to round-1/2: ScanOrphanedClosedBeads(specID, workdir, excludeBeadID string) ([]Orphan, error) (orphans.go:127), ClosedEpicBeadIDs(specID string) ([]string, error) (orphans.go:71), CheckPendingObligations(beadID string, getMeta func(string)(map[string]interface{},error)) error (panel_advisory.go:626), PanelGateRoots(root, wtPath, specID string) []string (panel_advisory.go:647) — grep for '^[+-]func ' in the 19bc8114..e71a7991 diff over these files returns nothing. uncoveredPendingObligations remains the single unexported shared core, unchanged signature ([]uncoveredPendingEntry, error), called from exactly two sites: CheckPendingObligations (line 627) and reconcilePendingRefutations (line 694, via completeGetMetadataFn) — reconcile does not call CheckPendingObligations (only test files reference that exported name). The delta is purely a body reorder: panel_refuted_entries comma-ok validation + decodeRefutations moved before the len(pending)==0 early return; no new field, no new parameter, no new import (the import block at panel_advisory.go:3-17 is untouched by the diff). go build ./... and go vet ./internal/complete both clean. Worktree left clean (only the untracked reviews/ dir, as expected).
